**Description**

Include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context. 
List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue)

**Did you change the workflow simulator to reflect this schema change?**

All yaml schema changes must be accompanied by an update to the yamls in the [workflow simulator](https://gitlab.gfdl.noaa.gov/fre/workflow-simulator)
Link the workflow simulator Gitlab PR here.
